profile.revenueModel: Life insurance premiums plus investment income on policyholder reserves.
profile.cyclicality: Defensive but rate-sensitive; spread income tied to KRW yield curve.
tailwinds: Higher Korean long-end yields lift reinvestment yields on bond portfolio
K-ICS solvency regime favors capital-strong insurers
Aging Korean demographics expand demand for retirement and protection products
headwinds: Korea's low birth rate shrinks long-run policyholder pool
BoK rate cuts compress investment spreads
Legacy high-guaranteed-rate policies pressure margins
threats: IFRS17/K-ICS reserve volatility
Competition from Samsung Life and Kyobo in domestic life market
Equity-market drawdowns hit variable annuity guarantees
opportunities: Cross-sell within Hanwha Group financial ecosystem
Overseas asset diversification via offshore bonds
profile.customerConcentration: Diversified Korean retail policyholder base.

profile.revenueModel: Foundry services manufacturing logic chips for fabless customers on a wafer-pricing basis.

revenueSegments.item: Mask making, testing and other services

profile.cyclicality: Highly cyclical, tied to global semiconductor capex and consumer/industrial chip demand.
tailwinds: China's semiconductor self-sufficiency drive funnels orders to domestic foundries
Big Fund III subsidies support capacity expansion
Localization of automotive and industrial MCUs in China
headwinds: US export controls block access to EUV and advanced DUV tools
Mature-node oversupply in China pressures wafer ASPs
Heavy depreciation from new fab ramps weighs on near-term margins
threats: Further US/Dutch tightening on equipment and IP
Customer loss to TSMC for any leading-edge work
Entity List or expanded US sanctions
opportunities: Onshoring of analog, power and image-sensor production in China
AI-related domestic GPU/ASIC production at trailing nodes
Capacity expansion at Beijing, Shenzhen, Lingang fabs
profile.customerConcentration: Concentrated among top Chinese fabless customers including HiSilicon-affiliated and consumer-electronics ASIC designers.

profile.revenueModel: Short-video platform monetizing via online marketing services, livestream e-commerce GMV take-rate, and live tipping.
profile.cyclicality: Cyclical with China consumer ad spending and discretionary e-commerce.
tailwinds: Shift of brand budgets from search/display to short-video

AI-driven ad targeting and content recommendation
headwinds: Weak China consumer sentiment caps ad budgets
Saturation of domestic DAU growth
Margin pressure from rising user-acquisition costs

Regulation on livestream e-commerce and minor-protection rules
Content moderation/regulatory fines
opportunities: Local services and food delivery expansion
AIGC tools improving creator economics and ad ROI
profile.customerConcentration: Diversified base of advertisers and creators; no material single-customer concentration.

profile.revenueModel: Manufacture and sale of branded prescription pharmaceuticals and APIs in China.

threats: Loss of exclusivity on key brand drug NBP
Pipeline trial failures

opportunities: Expansion of CNS franchise through line extensions
profile.customerConcentration: Diversified across Chinese hospital and pharmacy distribution channels.

profile.revenueModel: Operates integrated casino resorts in Macau earning gaming win, hotel, F&B and retail revenue.

Unknown.

profile.revenueModel: Hotel franchise, leased-and-operated and manachised fees across mid-scale to upscale brands in China and globally.

profile.revenueModel: Manufacture of military fighter aircraft (J-10, J-20) and related components for the PLA Air Force and exports.
